LanguageData.VEE_IncreasedDiseases.description: Diseases are 25% more common in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_IncreasedDiseases.label: increased diseases
LanguageData.VEE_NoDiseases.description: Diseases very rarely strike in this region, making them almost a nonexistent threat.
LanguageData.VEE_NoDiseases.label: no diseases
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedDiseases.description: Diseases are 25% less common in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedDiseases.label: reduced diseases
